nodes.label: AI for broad research and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools have made opposition research a lot easier

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: AI still makes obvious mistakes that a human would never make, and also blatantly hallucinates information

nodes.label: AI for brainstorming and big-picture ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI for factual or client-facing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I could see myself using AI to brainstorm or to bounce ideas off of more

nodes.label: AI use in education
nodes.grounding_span: I would never give a student information from AI

nodes.label: Generational AI acceptance
nodes.grounding_span: many of the instructors are Gen Z college kids, who see using AI for coursework as completely normal

nodes.label: Epistemic reliability and truth
nodes.grounding_span: I ended up not trusting the answer

nodes.label: Educational integrity and student development
nodes.grounding_span: An incorrect math fundamental learned from AI that a young student trusts to be correct could have huge consequences for years

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI for anything client-facing, because I fundamentally do not trust it

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for broad research
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools have made opposition research a lot easier

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI due to errors and hallucinations
nodes.grounding_span: AI still makes obvious mistakes that a human would never make, and also blatantly hallucinates information

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I could see myself using AI to brainstorm or to bounce ideas off of more

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI in education
nodes.grounding_span: I would never give a student information from AI

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI for anything client-facing

nodes.label: Concern about generational overreliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: It actually deeply terrifies me that an entire generation might be forgetting how to write

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. AI-inappropriate tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would never give a student information from AI, and I would never use AI for anything client-facing

nodes.label: Iterative verification and double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check when doing deeper research on my own
